calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Payment Rights & Payment For Court Reporter Fee
Off Calendar Jul-16-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
James Felton, Esq. (818-382-6200; jfelton@gblawllp.com) for Petitioner.
Andrew Boppart, Payee in propria persona.

Hearing is held (as fully reported in the reporter's notes). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER PEACHTREE SETTLEMENT FUNDING, LLC's Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Payment Rights is approved.

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard Ulmer, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Laura Reding, CSR No. 9711, Email: lreding@sftc.org. =(302/RBU)
